debug_info.goal:
S T : Set ℝ
hST : S ⊆ T
⊢ sorry S ≤ sorry T

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
simp_all [measureOf]
          <;>
          norm_num
        · -- Case: π ∉ S
          have h₁ : ¬(Real.pi : ℝ) ∈ T := by
            -- Since S ⊆ T, if π ∉ S, then π ∉ T
            intro h₂
            have h₃ : (Real.pi : ℝ) ∈ S := by
              have h₄ : (Real.pi : ℝ) ∈ T := h₂
              have h₅ : (Real.pi : ℝ) ∈ S := by
                by_contra h₅
                -- If π ∉ S, then π ∈ S is false, contradicting h₂
                simp_all [Set.subset_def]
                <;>
                tauto
              exact h₅
            contradiction
          simp_all [measureOf]
          <;>
          norm_num
